repo.title: GitHub - shadcn-ui/ui: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code. · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: shadcn/ui
teaches: forms, tables, and dashboard building blocks
fast iteration patterns for real apps
avoid: treating copied components as a finished design direction
mixing too many unrelated variants just because they exist
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: One of the fastest ways to learn how modern premium app UIs are assembled in practice.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: Strong product UI usually comes from disciplined composition more than fancy decoration.
